page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.large is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs utilizing an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core testing placing in the top 25%. However, multi-core CPU performance and overall Passmark CPU scores fall into the bottom 25%, reflecting the limited two-core configuration. Memory performance is mixed; while large-block write bandwidth and Passmark memory scores are average, small-block read-only memory bandwidth is poor, landing in the bottom 10%. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression show average throughput, whereas database operations and Redis SET operations perform in the lower tiers.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r8a.large offers a high-density memory allocation relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-bound workloads that do not require intensive multi-core processing. Due to its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is suitable for caching layers, lightweight in-memory databases, directory services, and general-purpose applications with moderate processing demands.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.large is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 2 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, running on a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9T24 processor with x86_64 architecture. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation with 2 physical cores and no hyperthreading. It contains no local storage or GPU accelerators, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities, though multi-core performance and database operations are relatively weak. Memory write bandwidth and single-threaded compression tasks perform at average levels. Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, the ecs.r8a.large is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy, low-compute tasks. It is best suited for in-memory caching, lightweight database hosting, and general-purpose workloads requiring a larger memory footprint without high CPU core counts.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.large is a memory-optimized instance with 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.large is a memory-optimized instance featuring 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC processor on x86_64 architecture.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for memory-bound workloads.

Equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, offering 8.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU performance but limited multi-core scaling
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for in-memory caching, lightweight databases, and general-purpose tasks
